items.prompt:
Using SQLite semantics, return paid Q1 2026 net revenue by customer. Preaggregate multiple refunds per order, use half-open dates [2026-01-01,2026-04-01), retain aggregates >= threshold, and order net descending then customer ascending.

orders(id,customer,status,amount,created)=[["O01","C2","paid",179,"2026-04-13"],["O02","C2","paid",225,"2026-04-15"],["O03","C1","cancelled",154,"2026-03-01"],["O04","C2","paid",173,"2026-04-10"],["O05","C4","cancelled",70,"2026-01-26"],["O06","C5","paid",41,"2026-04-22"],["O07","C5","paid",194,"2026-04-23"],["O08","C2","paid",163,"2026-01-01"],["O09","C5","paid",26,"2026-03-28"],["O10","C4","paid",200,"2026-01-12"],["O11","C1","paid",30,"2026-02-15"],["O12","C5","paid",226,"2026-02-24"],["O13","C3","cancelled",92,"2026-04-20"],["O14","C3","cancelled",221,"2026-04-18"],["O15","C5","cancelled",236,"2026-02-20"],["O16","C5","paid",237,"2026-01-17"],["O17","C1","paid",87,"2026-04-24"],["O18","C3","cancelled",53,"2026-03-25"]]
refunds(order_id,amount)=[["O02",1],["O05",12],["O12",37],["O12",59],["O14",72],["O16",74]]
threshold=150

Return only JSON: {"sql":"a single read-only SQLite SELECT/CTE","rows":[[customer,net_paid],...]}. Do not use parameters in submitted SQL.

key.reference_sql: WITH r AS (SELECT order_id,SUM(amount) refunded FROM refunds GROUP BY order_id) SELECT o.customer,SUM(o.amount-COALESCE(r.refunded,0)) net_paid FROM orders o LEFT JOIN r ON r.order_id=o.id WHERE o.status='paid' AND o.created>='2026-01-01' AND o.created<'2026-04-01' GROUP BY o.customer HAVING net_paid>=150 ORDER BY net_paid DESC,o.customer ASC

key.reference_sql: WITH r AS (SELECT order_id,SUM(amount) refunded FROM refunds GROUP BY order_id) SELECT o.customer,SUM(o.amount-COALESCE(r.refunded,0)) net_paid FROM orders o LEFT JOIN r ON r.order_id=o.id WHERE o.status='paid' AND o.created>='2026-01-01' AND o.created<'2026-04-01' GROUP BY o.customer HAVING net_paid>=200 ORDER BY net_paid DESC,o.customer ASC

key.reference_sql: WITH r AS (SELECT order_id,SUM(amount) refunded FROM refunds GROUP BY order_id) SELECT o.customer,SUM(o.amount-COALESCE(r.refunded,0)) net_paid FROM orders o LEFT JOIN r ON r.order_id=o.id WHERE o.status='paid' AND o.created>='2026-01-01' AND o.created<'2026-04-01' GROUP BY o.customer HAVING net_paid>=100 ORDER BY net_paid DESC,o.customer ASC

key.reference_sql: WITH r AS (SELECT order_id,SUM(amount) refunded FROM refunds GROUP BY order_id) SELECT o.customer,SUM(o.amount-COALESCE(r.refunded,0)) net_paid FROM orders o LEFT JOIN r ON r.order_id=o.id WHERE o.status='paid' AND o.created>='2026-01-01' AND o.created<'2026-04-01' GROUP BY o.customer HAVING net_paid>=100 ORDER BY net_paid DESC,o.customer ASC

key.reference_sql: WITH r AS (SELECT order_id,SUM(amount) refunded FROM refunds GROUP BY order_id) SELECT o.customer,SUM(o.amount-COALESCE(r.refunded,0)) net_paid FROM orders o LEFT JOIN r ON r.order_id=o.id WHERE o.status='paid' AND o.created>='2026-01-01' AND o.created<'2026-04-01' GROUP BY o.customer HAVING net_paid>=100 ORDER BY net_paid DESC,o.customer ASC

key.reference_sql: WITH r AS (SELECT order_id,SUM(amount) refunded FROM refunds GROUP BY order_id) SELECT o.customer,SUM(o.amount-COALESCE(r.refunded,0)) net_paid FROM orders o LEFT JOIN r ON r.order_id=o.id WHERE o.status='paid' AND o.created>='2026-01-01' AND o.created<'2026-04-01' GROUP BY o.customer HAVING net_paid>=100 ORDER BY net_paid DESC,o.customer ASC

key.reference_sql: WITH r AS (SELECT order_id,SUM(amount) refunded FROM refunds GROUP BY order_id) SELECT o.customer,SUM(o.amount-COALESCE(r.refunded,0)) net_paid FROM orders o LEFT JOIN r ON r.order_id=o.id WHERE o.status='paid' AND o.created>='2026-01-01' AND o.created<'2026-04-01' GROUP BY o.customer HAVING net_paid>=150 ORDER BY net_paid DESC,o.customer ASC

refunds(order_id,amount)=[["O02",15],["O03",6],["O05",1],["O05",3],["O11",7],["O12",34],["O13",44],["O15",25],["O17",33]]
threshold=200

Return only JSON: {"sql":"a single read-only SQLite SELECT/CTE","rows":[[customer,net_paid],...]}. Do not use parameters in submitted SQL.

key.reference_sql: WITH r AS (SELECT order_id,SUM(amount) refunded FROM refunds GROUP BY order_id) SELECT o.customer,SUM(o.amount-COALESCE(r.refunded,0)) net_paid FROM orders o LEFT JOIN r ON r.order_id=o.id WHERE o.status='paid' AND o.created>='2026-01-01' AND o.created<'2026-04-01' GROUP BY o.customer HAVING net_paid>=200 ORDER BY net_paid DESC,o.customer ASC

key.reference_sql: WITH r AS (SELECT order_id,SUM(amount) refunded FROM refunds GROUP BY order_id) SELECT o.customer,SUM(o.amount-COALESCE(r.refunded,0)) net_paid FROM orders o LEFT JOIN r ON r.order_id=o.id WHERE o.status='paid' AND o.created>='2026-01-01' AND o.created<'2026-04-01' GROUP BY o.customer HAVING net_paid>=100 ORDER BY net_paid DESC,o.customer ASC

Using SQLite semantics, return paid Q1 2026 net revenue by customer. Preaggregate multiple refunds per order, use half-open dates [2026-01-01,2026-04-01), retain aggregates >= threshold, and order net descending then customer ascending.

orders(id,customer,status,amount,created)=[["O01","C4","paid",22,"2026-02-13"],["O02","C1","paid",234,"2026-02-01"],["O03","C5","cancelled",125,"2026-03-26"],["O04","C4","paid",235,"2026-03-12"],["O05","C4","cancelled",148,"2026-03-27"],["O06","C5","paid",145,"2026-04-12"],["O07","C4","paid",133,"2026-04-12"],["O08","C1","paid",126,"2026-03-20"],["O09","C2","paid",102,"2026-03-22"],["O10","C4","paid",107,"2026-02-23"],["O11","C4","paid",130,"2026-03-17"],["O12","C2","cancelled",90,"2026-02-07"],["O13","C5","cancelled",213,"2026-01-19"],["O14","C1","paid",45,"2026-02-12"]]
refunds(order_id,amount)=[["O02",57],["O02",15],["O04",31],["O04",39],["O05",38],["O08",8],["O09",21],["O09",1],["O12",22],["O12",14],["O13",14]]
threshold=200

Return only JSON: {"sql":"a single read-only SQLite SELECT/CTE","rows":[[customer,net_paid],...]}. Do not use parameters in submitted SQL.

key.reference_sql: WITH r AS (SELECT order_id,SUM(amount) refunded FROM refunds GROUP BY order_id) SELECT o.customer,SUM(o.amount-COALESCE(r.refunded,0)) net_paid FROM orders o LEFT JOIN r ON r.order_id=o.id WHERE o.status='paid' AND o.created>='2026-01-01' AND o.created<'2026-04-01' GROUP BY o.customer HAVING net_paid>=200 ORDER BY net_paid DESC,o.customer ASC

Return only JSON: {"sql":"a single read-only SQLite SELECT/CTE","rows":[[customer,net_paid],...]}. Do not use parameters in submitted SQL.

key.reference_sql: WITH r AS (SELECT order_id,SUM(amount) refunded FROM refunds GROUP BY order_id) SELECT o.customer,SUM(o.amount-COALESCE(r.refunded,0)) net_paid FROM orders o LEFT JOIN r ON r.order_id=o.id WHERE o.status='paid' AND o.created>='2026-01-01' AND o.created<'2026-04-01' GROUP BY o.customer HAVING net_paid>=200 ORDER BY net_paid DESC,o.customer ASC

key.reference_sql: WITH r AS (SELECT order_id,SUM(amount) refunded FROM refunds GROUP BY order_id) SELECT o.customer,SUM(o.amount-COALESCE(r.refunded,0)) net_paid FROM orders o LEFT JOIN r ON r.order_id=o.id WHERE o.status='paid' AND o.created>='2026-01-01' AND o.created<'2026-04-01' GROUP BY o.customer HAVING net_paid>=100 ORDER BY net_paid DESC,o.customer ASC
